title: Dogfood: run a real non-Claude cli gather end to end, closing decision 0019's 'first dogfood pending'
action: Decision 0019 self-reports confidence 0.6: 'the dispatch protocol is prose and has NOT run a real external worker yet — first dogfood pending', and lists that run under Deferred. Close it, or report honestly that it cannot be closed. Using the contract ao-2a/ao-2b just wrote — configured command run VERBATIM, prompt on stdin, stdout captured as the digest, all paths absolute — dispatch ONE real gather to the owner's configured executor (`bash -lc 'agy -p "$(cat)" --model "Gemini 3.5 Flash (High)" --dangerously-skip-permissions --print-timeout 30m'`) on a genuine repo question whose answer is independently checkable — e.g. 'list every file under hooks/ that imports adapter.mjs, with line anchors'. Then VERIFY the digest against ground truth yourself (grep it). Record in the spike doc: the exact command line used, the prompt, the raw digest, the ground-truth check, wall-clock duration, and a '## Verdict' section — GO or NO-GO for making generation cli-shaped by default. A NO-GO is a finding, not a failure; write it as plainly as a GO. Do NOT flip .bee/config.json in this cell — the config flip is the orchestrator's act, and only on a GO.

truths: A real external non-Claude worker ran, and its digest was checked against ground truth by an independent grep
The spike records the verbatim command, the raw digest, the ground-truth check and a GO/NO-GO verdict
Decision 0019's 'first dogfood pending' is answered either way
prohibitions: Do NOT edit .bee/config.json in this cell
Do NOT accept the worker's digest on its word — probe 2 proved it will claim success having done nothing
Do NOT write repo source from this cell; it is a spike

verify: cd /home/thanhsmind/projects/goglbe/beegog && test -s .bee/spikes/advisor-and-orchestration/s3-cli-gather-dogfood.md && grep -qE '^## Verdict' .bee/spikes/advisor-and-orchestration/s3-cli-gather-dogfood.md && echo SPIKE_OK
